title: Roboclaws Technical Design Document
summary: Technical design spec for multi-agent VLM robots in AI2-THOR: platform selection, APIs, game rules, system architecture, VLM prompting contract, cost model, and phased implementation plan.
scope: prompt structure and JSON I/O contract
notes: Document mixes SPEC (API tables, action lists, JSON schemas, NFRs like cost/latency, prompt contract) with PRD-ish scenario rules and roadmap prose. Classified SPEC because the load-bearing content is technical contracts (AI2-THOR APIs, per-step data schema, VLM I/O JSON, file/module layout) that implementation must honor. Goals/scenarios read as requirements but are embedded inside the same technical design artifact rather than a separate PRD.
